{{Stub}}

== Donations ==
There are many ways to help Cubyz: contributing directly, donating and helping out on some of the social media channels, see the information below:

You can donate to us via [https://www.patreon.com/cw/Cubyz Cubyz Patreon].

== Code Changes ==
To help Cubyz with Code Changes on Github, you can start by reading the [https://github.com/PixelGuys/Cubyz/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md Cubyz Contributions Guide] on Github. Your help is much appreciated.

== Volunteering ==
Help make Youtube videos for the [https://www.youtube.com/@CubyzGame Official Cubyz Youtube Channel]:

Organize events on the Cubyz {{DiscordLink}}:

Maintain the Cubyz Wiki: [[Contribute to the Wiki]]

Organize PRs and Issues on [https://github.com/PixelGuys/Cubyz Github]:

Moderate on [https://www.reddit.com/r/CubyzGame/ Reddit]:
